seoTitle: Kingswood vs Klemzig — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kingswood and Klemzig. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kingswood and Klemzig.
heading: Kingswood vs Klemzig — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingswood, South Australia and Klemzig, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kingswood has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Klemzig (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingswood or Klemzig safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingswood has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Klemzig scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingswood scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Klemzig scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingswood or Klemzig?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kingswood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
